title: helenium helenioides
intro: Helenium helenioides, also known as Common Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helenium helenioides include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in herbal teas, salves, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
